title: 菊花賞の後に・恐るべし福の壁

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That was quite exhausting. What a
workout.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru, you're quite light on your feet. You
practically flew right past me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! I sped up and finished before you,
didn't I? I felt like I was rolling nothing but sixes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Actually, maybe I rolled a ten? Or even a twenty?
Whatever it was, my rolls were, well, on a roll! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Who knew... luck could make you this strong?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Luck? Strong?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, I get it! I guess that saying is correct after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: What saying?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know! The Kikuka Sho is won by the
strongest Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's gotta mean it's won by the Umamusume
with the strongest luck!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ah, is that what it means?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what Matikanefukukitaru says, it's
obvious she didn't win because of just luck.
Mejiro Bright did her best out there, but it wasn't
enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I may have lost today, but I still believe
I've managed to carve the Mejiro name into the
track at Kyoto.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Long-distance races are such a joy. They're quite
different from medium-lengths. I'm excited to try
another.
choice_data_list: They've got their own appeal, huh.
They've got their own appeal, huh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Mejiro Bright proved she can manage a
3,000-meter race. We reflect on her run and
discuss her future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She could continue to focus on long-distance or
improve her craft by returning to medium.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I want what the Mejiro family wants.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
So I will not waver. The Mejiro path leads next to
the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess Mejiro Bright sees the path ahead of her
clear as day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First was the Kikuka Sho, and now the spring
Tenno Sho... but does it really lead to a top
senior-year G1 long-distance race?

If you cannot make up your mind quite yet, why
don't you perform a test first?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, McQueen, Ryan! You're both here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan and I have been discussing where we think
your true affinity lies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, there is an upcoming race ideal for
assessing your potential as a stayer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An ideal race? She must be talking about...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. At 3,600 meters, it is the longest race
in the country. Further, it is a mixed G2 race that
includes senior year Umamusume. If you can
secure a victory there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There will be no reason to doubt your abilities as
a stayer. Right, Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I think it's better not to ignore Bright's
potential.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, what do you say to that idea, Trainer? Do
you agree?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. It's quiiite a long one, right? I'm
excited just thinking about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Stayers Stakes—with its unparalleled length,
it's a clear standout of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think there we'll find our answer to the mystery
of Mejiro Bright's true talents.
